name: Brewvet
subtitle: 3-Day Black Hills Brewery Bike Tour
description: A three-day cycling tour connecting Black Hills breweries. Friday evening brewery crawl through Rapid City, followed by two epic Saturday and Sunday loops through the southern and northern Black Hills — with sag stops serving local craft beer at every turn.
notes: This is a tour, not a race. Plan 4.5–5 hours for Saturday and Sunday loops (~10 mph average).
One sag vehicle — stay with the group. No benefit in riding ahead.
Half-pour (6–8 oz) at each sag stop. No beer served to minors. ID may be required.
After completing each route, we visit the breweries in order shown.
Complete all three days to earn a Brewvet card with stamps at each stop.

name: 8 Over 7
subtitle: 3-Day Black Hills Singletrack Bikepacking
description: The legendary 8 Over 7 as a 3-day bikepacking trip. Depart Spearfish Friday, ride Mickelson Trail to Sylvan Lake to camp. Saturday and Sunday cover the full 100+ mile singletrack link-up through pine forest, high-country ridgelines, and technical terrain — with resupply stops in Custer and Deerfield. Back in Spearfish by Sunday evening.
notes: If weather looks terrible, postpone to the following weekend (May 22–24).
Late joiners: get dropped off at Sylvan Lake Friday afternoon/evening to meet the group.
Carry enough water and food between resupply points. Cell service is spotty.
The full route climbs nearly 10,000 feet across 3 days. Pace yourself.
Trail conditions vary — check recent reports for deadfall and washouts.
This is bikepacking — pack overnight gear for Friday night at Sylvan Lake.

checklist.title: Photo: Spearfish departure
checklist.description: Geotagged photo at the start. Group shot before rolling out.

checklist.title: Photo: Mickelson Trail entry point
checklist.description: Where do you hop on Mickelson? Photo the trailhead sign.

checklist.title: Photo: Sylvan Lake camp spot
checklist.description: Document the overnight setup — helps future riders plan their bivy.

checklist.title: Custer resupply: What's open Saturday AM?
checklist.description: Note the store name, hours, and what you stocked up on. Key intel for the guide.

checklist.title: Water sources between resupply points
checklist.description: Note every reliable water source (creek, spigot, campground). Seasonal?

checklist.title: Cell service zones: Where does signal drop/return?
checklist.description: Note mile markers for dead zones. Critical for emergency planning.

checklist.title: Photos: Confusing trail junctions
checklist.description: Any fork without a sign? Photo it with a note on which way to go.

checklist.title: Trail surface: Major terrain changes
checklist.description: Where does flowy singletrack turn technical? Rock gardens, roots, sand.

checklist.title: Deerfield resupply: What's available Sunday AM?
checklist.description: Store, gas station, or campground store? Note what's open and what they carry.

checklist.title: Bail-out points: Exits to roads
checklist.description: Where can a rider exit to pavement? Note trail name and direction to nearest town.

checklist.title: Photo: High country ridge / best viewpoint
checklist.description: Capture the scenic highlight. Geotagged photo becomes a landmark.

checklist.title: Voice memos: Tricky navigation
checklist.description: Quick voice note at confusing spots. 'Turn left at the big rock' is gold.

checklist.title: Time splits: Screenshot Garmin at landmarks
checklist.description: Elapsed time at key points calibrates pace estimates for future riders.

checklist.title: Photo: Back in Spearfish
checklist.description: You did it. Finish line photo. You earned this one.

stops.name: Spearfish
stops.description: Depart Spearfish. Ride Mickelson Trail south toward Sylvan Peak.

stops.name: Mickelson Trail
stops.description: Follow Mickelson Trail — crushed gravel, gentle grade, well-marked.

stops.name: Sylvan Lake
stops.description: Camp here for the night. Late joiners can get dropped off Friday evening.

stops.name: Sylvan Lake
stops.description: Break camp and roll out. Big day ahead.

stops.name: Custer Resupply
stops.description: Saturday morning resupply. Top off water, food, and calories before the backcountry.

stops.name: High Country Ridge
stops.description: Highest terrain of the trip. Sustained climbing through pine forest.

stops.name: Camp — End of Day 2
stops.description: Set up camp. Rest up for the final push tomorrow.

stops.name: Camp
stops.description: Final day. Break camp and head north toward Spearfish.

stops.name: Deerfield Resupply
stops.description: Sunday morning resupply. Last chance to stock up before the final stretch.

stops.name: Deadwood Descent
stops.description: Beginning of the final descent. The end is in sight.

stops.name: Spearfish
stops.description: You're back. 3 days, 100+ miles, ~10,000 feet of climbing. Legend.
